question_text: Your spouse has recently become very religious and wants your children to attend church every Sunday. You respect their beliefs, but you also believe in giving your children the freedom to explore and decide their own beliefs. Should you allow your spouse to take your children to church every Sunday, or insist on letting your children decide when they're older?
